title: Creamy Beef Tacos
description: A twist on traditional tacos with a rich, creamy sauce. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Brown the ground beef in a large skillet over medium-high heat, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Once the beef is browned, add the taco seasoning and stir to combine.
Add the diced onion and minced garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
Stir in the creamy sauce and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let the mixture simmer for 5-7 minutes.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the beef mixture onto a tortilla and serving hot.
Optional toppings include diced tomatoes, shredded lettuce, and shredded cheese.
